CustomField.description: Product name or keyword to match against Product2.Name. Example: 'WatchTower' matches 'WatchTower. One boardmultiple Jiras (Server) Unlimu'. This matches against the Product2 records that will be used for OpportunityLineItems.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Product name or keyword to match against Product2.Name. Example: 'WatchTower' matches 'WatchTower. One boardmultiple Jiras (Server) Unlimu'. This matches against the Product2 records that will be used for OpportunityLineItems.
CustomField.label: Search String
